metadata.seed: Yeah. So in school. I am in school for teaching, and we have to give presentations a lot, as you can imagine, on different things. And so it's something that's recurring. And what happened was I gave a really bad one one time. Yeah. I wasn't feeling very well, and I gave. I think I was just supposed tired from studying all night, and I gave a really bad presentation. And then, like, now, ever since, like, when I've tried to give subsequent presentations, I am just so nervous and I'm up there, like, sweating and, like, starting to forget what I'm gonna say. And I'm just, like, a fear of getting up there and having to get a presentation because I feel like I'm gonna bomb it.

patient.query: Yeah. So in school. I am in school for teaching, and we have to give presentations a lot, as you can imagine, on different things. And so it's something that's recurring. And I'm just, like, a fear of getting up there and having to get a presentation because I feel like I'm gonna bomb it.

Let's explore together how we might approach these feelings and find ways to manage them more effectively.

patient.query: I'm just feeling really overwhelmed lately. It's like every little thing sets off this wave of anxiety that I can't quite shake off. I'm starting to worry that I won't be able to control it.

patient.query: I guess it's just hard to pinpoint exactly what triggers it. Sometimes, I feel so on edge that even normal conversations feel daunting. I worry that I’m being too much or not enough, and that just makes everything worse.

patient.query: Yeah, I guess that sounds right. It's like I'm stuck in this loop of questioning myself all the time. I want to just be present and enjoy things, but instead, I keep worrying about how I come across. It’s exhausting.

patient.query: I don’t know, it’s just hard to think of alternatives when I’m in that anxious state. It's like my mind goes blank and all I can feel is this pressure to perform, to be perfect. I just want to feel more confident, but it feels so out of reach sometimes.
